description: Repository-local corpus used to audit the single-witness IGNTP transcription subset. Real witnesses are supplemented with focused fixtures that exercise rarer carrier families not present in the two checked-in witness files.

entries.label: P118 Romans
entries.notes: Sparse real witness with supplied text, gaps, abbreviations, and simple correction readings.

entries.label: 01 Romans
entries.notes: Dense real witness with extensive book/chapter/verse structure, corrections, and marginal formwork.

entries.label: Kitchen sink body fixture
entries.notes: Exercises body-level carrier families such as handShift, space, milestone, atoms, wrappers, and metamark.

entries.label: Kitchen sink editorial fixture
entries.notes: Exercises standalone metamarks and editorial action carriers.

entries.label: Kitchen sink header/msDesc fixture
entries.notes: Exercises TEI header metadata and manuscript-description preservation.

entries.label: Kitchen sink apparatus fixture
entries.notes: Exercises broader apparatus constructs that must stay explicitly rejected.
